ocr_text:
金星 | Golden Spots
如點滴散狀，色澤金黃，石理微粗，有鋒芒，利於發墨。
Resembling scattered droplets, reflecting a golden hue, slightly coarse stone texture, and sharp edges. The iron rust spots create favorable conditions for ink dispersion.
(硯上刻銘：石渠閣瓦以瓦肯其形為硯也…乾隆御銘)

gallery_guess: 秦漢 青銅器 展區
ocr_text:
樂壽吉祥
Felicitous and Auspicious
秦漢人對吉祥題材及祝語深為喜好，如用「羊」象徵「祥」，用「龜」象徵「壽」，「宜子孫」、「樂未央」、「出入大吉」等銘文更是流行，成為此時期器物裝飾和銘文的一大特色。
Words of auspiciousness were favorites of the Qin and Han people, and characterized the objects made during the period. They employed homonyms widely and connotatively to convey best wishes, such as goat for auspicious (both pronounced xian), turtle for longevity (shou). Other propitious expressions also prevailed: "Benefiting Descendants", "Everlasting Felicity", "Favorable Both Indoors and Outdoors".
羊鎮 Weight in the shape of goat
龜鎮 Weight in the shape of turtle
樂未央 Inscription of "Everlasting Felicity"
出入大吉 Inscription of "Favorable Both Indoors and Outdoors"
caption: 秦漢吉祥題材介紹圖板「樂壽吉祥」，含羊鎮、龜鎮及吉語印範例。

gallery_guess: 秦漢 青銅器 展區
ocr_text:
嘉量剖視圖
Section view of the measure Jia-liang
斛 hu / 升 sheng / 合 ge / 龠 yue / 斗 dou
「量」是用來測量容量的工具，「嘉量」意即美善之量器。此器為王莽建立新朝後，託古改訂度量衡制度的重要見證。全器通高25.6公分，由五個量體組成。量體間的換算關係為一斛十斗，一斗十升，一升十合，一合二龠，基本體現十進位的度量觀念。
caption: 嘉量剖視圖解，標示斛、斗、升、合、龠五個量體與十進位換算關係。

gallery_guess: 秦漢 青銅器 展區

caption: 嘉量五量體銘文拓本圖解，分甲乙丙丁戊巳六段並附剖面示意。
notes: 銘文小字密集，未逐字辨識

gallery_guess: 秦漢 青銅器 展區
ocr_text:
簡樸務實
Simple and Practical
秦漢人製作銅器，其設計多由實用思考出發。雖較商周簡樸，但功能上卻有勝於前代之處。例如鼎與鍑鐙之器蓋可翻轉以作盛食之用；甑、釜、盆合一，讓烹飪更為方便；為了便利使用及攜帶，而有各式燈具之設計，種種巧思更貼近一般人的生活所需。
Qin and Han were practical people who cast their bronzes based on utilitarianism...
瓦紋燈蓋起方便收藏 Cover down the lid to store
瓦紋燈打開增加照明 Open up the lamp to increase light
轆轤燈蓋起方便攜帶 Cover down the lid to carry
轆轤燈打開即可照明 Open up the lid to lighten
caption: 秦漢銅器實用設計介紹圖板「簡樸務實」，舉瓦紋燈、轆轤燈為例。

gallery_guess: 秦漢 印章 展區
ocr_text:
秦印
Qin Seals
秦印上的文字是當時流行的官方文字，改古篆的圓婉為方折，也解散了部分篆體的纏繞成簡單的點畫，出現了隸書的結構雛形。
The inscriptions on the Qin seals were also of characters current in the Qin government. It moved away from the rounder contours of the old zhuan (seal script) and adopted a more angular manner. The change disengaged some of the long entwining lines into dots and short strokes; the resulting composition bore great resemblance to the later lishu (clerical script).
caption: 秦印介紹圖板，含一方秦印的鈕部與印面（朱文）。
notes: 與 IMG_4909 為同一圖板的兩張

gallery_guess: 秦漢 印章 展區
ocr_text:
秦印
Qin Seals
秦印上的文字是當時流行的官方文字，改古篆的圓婉為方折，也解散了部分篆體的纏繞成簡單的點畫，出現了隸書的結構雛形。
The inscriptions on the Qin seals were also of characters current in the Qin government. It moved away from the rounder contours of the old zhuan (seal script) and adopted a more angular manner. The change disengaged some of the long entwining lines into dots and short strokes; the resulting composition bore great resemblance to the later lishu (clerical script).
caption: 秦印介紹圖板（同前），印鈕與印面正面特寫。
notes: 與 IMG_4908 為同一圖板，角度略不同

ocr_text:
物勒工名
Accountability in Manufacture
所謂「物勒工名」，是指參加器物生產者必須把自己的名字刻在上面，以便日後追究。《呂氏春秋·孟冬紀》：「物勒工名，以考其誠；工有不當，必行其罪」，這說明了此時器物的生產已建立了嚴格的管理制度。
As a measure of accountability, some bronzes were now marked with the names of the persons who were involved in the manufacturing process, suggesting that a rigorous management system was already in place to ensure quality of workmanship and to hold those accountable who did not their jobs well.
移至304陳列室展出 On display in Gallery 304
三年代相鈹 Halberd of San-nian-dai-xiang
元年安平相邦戈 Ge dagger of Yuan-nian-an-ping-xiang-bang
caption: 「物勒工名」介紹圖板，舉三年代相鈹與元年安平相邦戈銘文為例。
notes: 圖板註明實物移至304陳列室展出

gallery_guess: 青銅兵器/車馬器 展區
ocr_text:
車馬器
Bronze Trappings and Parts of a Chariot
馬面飾，原當綴于皮革，以套覆在馬首上。獸面構形，又鑲嵌綠松石，使駿馬更增雄偉氣勢。
鑾，為立于馬車軛首衡上之銅鈴，中有鈴球，用以節制行車節奏。
The horse headpiece, in the shape of an animal mask and inlaid with turquoise, must have given the creature a majestic look.
The bronze Luan bell installed on the front crossbar was used to regulate the pace of the vehicle.
caption: 車馬器介紹圖板，圖解馬面飾與鑾鈴在馬車上的位置。
